CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:UITable.kt:(header = "Header 2", sortedBy = { it.text2 }, weight = 2.0f, cellValue = { it.text2 }, footer = { "Footer teste" })

FunctionExpressionBody:PlatformUtils.ios.kt:{ return NSNumberFormatter().apply { numberStyle = NSNumberFormatterPercentStyle locale = NSLocale.currentLocale maximumFractionDigits = 2u }.numberFromString(this)?.doubleValue() }

FunctionExpressionBody:PlatformUtils.ios.kt:{ return NSNumberFormatter().apply { numberStyle = NSNumberFormatterPercentStyle locale = NSLocale.currentLocale maximumFractionDigits = 2u }.stringFromNumber(NSNumber(double = this))!! }

FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilder.kt:{ return TableColumn( title = title, weight = weight, alignment = alignment, sortStrategy = ColumnSortStrategy { item -> data(item) }, cellContent = cellContent, footerOperation = footerOperation ) }

FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return TableColumn( title = title, weight = weight, alignment = alignment, sortStrategy = NotSortableStrategy(), cellContent = content, footerOperation = footerOperation ) }

FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return TableColumn( title = title, weight = weight, alignment = alignment, sortStrategy = if (sortable) ColumnSortStrategy(getValue) else NotSortableStrategy(), cellContent = { item -> Text( modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 8.dp), text = format(item), style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface ) } ) }

FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return TableColumn( title = title, weight = weight, alignment = alignment, sortStrategy = if (sortable) ColumnSortStrategy(getValue) else NotSortableStrategy(), cellContent = { item -> Text( modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 8.dp), text = format(item), style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface ) }, footerOperation = footerOperation ) }
FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return this.copy( footerOperation = { data -> if (data.isEmpty()) null else formatter(data.map { extractor(it).toDouble() }.average()) } ) }
FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return this.copy( footerOperation = { data -> if (data.isEmpty()) null else formatter(data.size) } ) }
FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return this.copy( footerOperation = { data -> if (data.isEmpty()) null else formatter(data.sumOf { extractor(it).toDouble() }) } ) }
FunctionExpressionBody:TableColumnBuilders.kt:{ return this.copy( footerOperation = { if (it.isEmpty()) null else text } ) }
FunctionExpressionBody:TableSortState.kt:{ return remember { TableSortState<T>().apply { columnIndex = initialColumnIndex ascending = initialAscending } } }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) infoContainerDark else infoContainerLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) infoDark else infoLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) onInfoContainerDark else onInfoContainerLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) onInfoDark else onInfoLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) onSuccessContainerDark else onSuccessContainerLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) onSuccessDark else onSuccessLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) onWarningContainerDark else onWarningContainerLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) onWarningDark else onWarningLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) successContainerDark else successContainerLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) successDark else successLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) warningContainerDark else warningContainerLight }
FunctionExpressionBody:Theme.kt:{ return if (isDark) warningDark else warningLight }

FunctionExpressionBody:TransactionTable.kt:{ return listOf( UiTableDataColumn( text = "Transação", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, comparable = { it.viewData.type }, content = { Text(it.formatted.type) } ), UiTableDataColumn( text = "Data", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, alignment = Alignment.Center, comparable = { it.viewData.date }, content = { Text(it.formatted.date) } ), UiTableDataColumn( text = "Quantidade", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, alignment = Alignment.CenterEnd, comparable = { it.viewData.quantity ?: 0.0 }, content = { Text(it.formatted.quantity ?: "-") } ), UiTableDataColumn( text = "Preço Unitário", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, alignment = Alignment.CenterEnd, comparable = { it.viewData.unitPrice ?: 0.0 }, content = { Text(it.formatted.unitPrice ?: "-") } ), UiTableDataColumn( text = "Valor Total", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, alignment = Alignment.CenterEnd, comparable = { it.viewData.totalValue }, content = { Text(it.formatted.totalValue) } ), ) }

FunctionExpressionBody:TransactionTable.kt:{ return listOf( UiTableDataColumn( text = "Transação", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, comparable = { it.viewData.type }, content = { Text(it.formatted.type) } ), UiTableDataColumn( text = "Data", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, alignment = Alignment.Center, comparable = { it.viewData.date }, content = { Text(it.formatted.date) } ), UiTableDataColumn( text = "Valor Total", width = TableColumnWidth.MaxIntrinsic, alignment = Alignment.CenterEnd, comparable = { it.viewData.totalValue }, content = { Text(it.formatted.totalValue) } ), ) }

FunctionExpressionBody:UiTableRenderers.kt:{ return when (this) { Alignment.Start -> Alignment.CenterStart Alignment.CenterHorizontally -> Alignment.Center Alignment.End -> Alignment.CenterEnd else -> Alignment.CenterStart } }
FunctionExpressionBody:UiTableResponsive.kt:ResponsiveState${ return if (index in weights.indices) weights[index] else 1.0f }
FunctionExpressionBody:UiTableSort.kt:SortDataCalculator${ return data.sortedWith( strategy.createComparator( sortState.sortedColumnIndex, sortState.isAscending, columns ) ) }

LongMethod:InputTextMoney.kt:@Deprecated("Usar o novo input") @Composable internal fun InputTextMoney
MaxLineLength:AssetHistoryScreen.kt:{ entry: HoldingHistoryView, value: Double -> vm.processIntent(HistoryIntent.UpdateEntryValue(entry.entry, value)) }
MaxLineLength:Color.kt:internal val onSurfaceVariantLight = Color(0xFF3A3E42) // Contraste alto para legibilidade sobre surface e surfaceContainerLow
MaxLineLength:UITable.kt:column(header = "Header 2", sortedBy = { it.text2 }, weight = 2.0f, cellValue = { it.text2 }, footer = { "Footer teste" })
MaximumLineLength:Color.kt:// Contraste alto para legibilidade sobre surface e surfaceContainerLow
MaximumLineLength:SelectComponent.kt:// The `menuAnchor` modifier must be passed to the text field for correctness.
MultiLineIfElse:AssetsRoute.kt:AssetsScreenFixedIncome( state = tableState!!, category = category, viewModel = tableVm )
MultiLineIfElse:AssetsRoute.kt:AssetsScreenFunds( state = tableState!!, category = category, viewModel = tableVm )
MultiLineIfElse:AssetsRoute.kt:AssetsScreenVariableIncome( state = tableState!!, category = category, viewModel = tableVm )

MultiLineIfElse:TableHeader.kt:Icon( imageVector = if (sortState.ascending) Icons.Default.ArrowUpward else Icons.Default.ArrowDownward, contentDescription = null, modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp), tint = theme.sortIcon )
MultiLineIfElse:UITable.kt:TableFooter( data = data, columns = columns, responsiveState = responsiveState, cellRenderer = cellRenderer )
ParameterListWrapping:AssetsViewModel.kt:AssetsViewModel.AssetsIntent.UpdateBrokerage$(val assetId: Long, val brokerage: Brokerage?, val category: InvestmentCategory)
ParameterListWrapping:AssetsViewModel.kt:AssetsViewModel.AssetsIntent.UpdateGoal$(val assetId: Long, val goal: FinancialGoal?, val category: InvestmentCategory)
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:SortStrategy.kt:SortStrategy$/** * Indica se a coluna é ordenável */
SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TableSortState.kt:TableSortState$/** * Alterna a direção de ordenação da coluna atual */

SpacingBetweenDeclarationsWithComments:TableSortState.kt:TableSortState$/** * Atualiza o estado de ordenação * @param index Índice da coluna a ordenar * @param ascending Se true, ordena de forma crescente */
ValueParameterComment:TableColumnBuilders.kt:// Opcional: permite ordenar por data real se fornecido
